flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Honolulu Community College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (62.1% → 54.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Honolulu Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Honolulu Community College rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 (10.6% → 13.1%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Honolulu Community College fell 16% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.0k → $7.5k).
